input.name: Business needs discovery
input.description: This is the first structured conversation with a potential customer who knows that an important daily workflow is creating delays, rework, or lost business but has not yet defined the root problem. Information is moving between messages, spreadsheets, and disconnected tools, so exceptions are noticed late and employees compensate with manual work. The customer has heard competing explanations from colleagues and has not agreed on the economic impact, urgency, available budget, or decision participants. The learner must map the current workflow, uncover concrete consequences and stakeholder priorities, avoid a generic product pitch, and earn a specific next step.
input.descriptionZhCn: 这是与一名潜在客户的首次正式沟通。客户已经意识到某项关键日常流程正在造成延误、返工或业务损失，但尚未明确问题根因。信息在消息、表格和多个割裂工具之间流转，异常往往被发现得太晚，员工只能依靠大量手工操作补救。客户内部对原因有不同判断，也尚未就经济影响、紧迫程度、可用预算和决策参与者达成共识。学员需要梳理当前流程，发现具体后果和相关方重点，避免泛泛推销，并争取一个明确的下一步。

input.name: Handling a price objection
input.description: The customer has received a formal proposal whose price is roughly twenty percent above the approved budget, while a competing vendor has submitted a cheaper alternative. The customer is not yet convinced that the additional value, payback period, integration effort, and service commitments justify the difference. An internal recommendation is due soon, so there is pressure to reduce price quickly. The learner must determine whether price is the real objection, connect value to measurable outcomes, explain relevant trade-offs, and agree on a defensible next step without offering an unsupported early discount.
input.descriptionZhCn: 客户收到的正式报价比已批准预算高约百分之二十，同时另一家供应商给出了更便宜的替代方案。客户尚未确信额外价值、回报周期、集成投入和服务承诺足以解释这部分价差。内部供应商建议即将到期，因此客户希望尽快压价。学员需要判断价格是否是真实异议，把价值与可量化结果联系起来，说明不同方案的取舍，并在不轻率降价的前提下达成一个站得住脚的下一步。

input.name: Renewal recovery
input.description: The conversation takes place six weeks before renewal with an existing customer whose adoption has fallen below the level promised during implementation. Users report workflow friction, unresolved integration issues, and reports that do not give managers the visibility they expected. The executive sponsor is under cost pressure and is considering either reducing scope or moving to another provider, although the customer is still open to recovery if there is a credible plan. The learner must acknowledge the experience without becoming defensive, identify the root causes and business impact, rebuild trust, and secure a recovery plan with owners, milestones, and a follow-up date.
input.descriptionZhCn: 本次沟通发生在续约前六周，现有客户的实际使用率低于实施阶段的预期。终端用户反馈流程操作不顺、集成问题迟迟未解决，管理报表也没有提供原本期待的经营可视性。高层负责人正面临成本压力，正在考虑缩减范围或更换供应商，但如果能看到可信的改进方案，客户仍愿意给一次挽回机会。学员需要在不辩解的前提下承接客户感受，找出问题根因和业务影响，修复信任，并达成包含责任人、里程碑和复盘时间的恢复计划。
